summary: CI prompt hash failures were traced to Linux checkout line endings for frozen prompt text assets.
The prompt text files and prompt hash manifest were not rewritten.
.gitattributes now forces prompts/*.txt to CRLF checkout bytes so CI materializes the frozen bytes used by the manifest.
validation: git check-attr confirmed prompts/*.txt resolves to text eol=crlf.
Prompt manifest hashes verified locally against prompts/prompt_hash_manifest.json.
